programmes.show_description: This channel is currently off air.
Comment and analysis on the big stories of the day in Ireland and abroad with a panel of guests covering the key issues. (HD)
Dr Makori takes a crash course in dealing with Yorkshire folk, Stella deals with the confessions of a window cleaner, and Carnegie has some news. (HD)
The former Republic of Ireland midfielder talks about his life in professional football and his battles with addiction. (HD)
Three fashionistas compete with each other in a shopping spree to win the ultimate prize of going on a blind date with a fashion savvy singleton. (HD)

Hosted by Emma Willis and comedian Tom Allen, we pair eight celebrities with professional chefs who mentor, teach and take them from passionate amateurs to restaurant-level cooks. (HD)

A lively mix of celebrity chat with national and international guests, fabulous food from the country's top Chefs, expert advice and all the unmissable stories making the headlines (HD)
Gift wrapped is a fun quiz which sees four couples compete to win their perfect gift list. Each couple builds a unique list by selecting their own personal dream prizes. (HD)
From Clondalkin to Beijing. Olympic silver medallist Kenny Egan's journey to the top of the amateur boxing world and his hidden struggles with addiction (HD)
Jeremy Wade travels to one of the few rivers left on the planet that will still test a fisherman - the Congo. He is on the trail of a terrifying legend - the spirit Mami Wata. (HD)
Sydney Airport is one of the busiest transport hubs in the world. Offering unprecedented access behind the scenes and capturing all the drama as it unfolds. (HD)
From monstrous sharks to killer catfish, his investigations are as varied and challenging as ever. Jeremy travels the world to uncover a range of underwater assassins. (HD)

Bradley Walsh hosts a spin-off from The Chase in which contestants take on two, three, four or all five of the quiz's resident experts at once. (HD)
Huge global hit game show The Chase is the ultimate heart-racing, high-pressure quiz. (HD)
Presided over by outspoken Judge Judith Sheindlin; with her no-nonsense, decisive approach to justice; she has established herself as a pop-culture icon for generations of viewers. (HD)
A mix of celebrity interviews, entertainment news, current affairs discussions, a look at sports competitions, health columns, cooking tips and tricks, and more. (HD)

A hunting expedition ends in tragedy, and staff at the Royal persuade a devout Catholic mother to be sterilised - much to the disgust of her priest. (HD)
Growing up in The Troubles in south Armagh, Oisin McConville became a local legend as he recovered from a missed penalty to score the winning goal in their only All-Ireland win. (HD)
